routes.description: A FAIRE — Connexion S/4HANA : créer destination 's4hana' dans BTP Cockpit > Connectivity > Destinations. Type=HTTP, Auth=OAuth2SAMLBearerAssertion, URL=https://<s4host>:<port>. Propriétés additionnelles : sap-client=100, WebIDEUsage=odata_abap

A FAIRE — Connexion CAP Service : destination 'remunerations-srv' auto-injectée par MTA si même BTP space. Sinon créer manuellement avec Type=HTTP, Auth=OAuth2UserTokenExchange, URL=https://<cap-app>.cfapps.<region>.hana.ondemand.com

A FAIRE — Connexion BPA : destination 'workflow-service', Auth=OAuth2ClientCredentials, URL=https://<tenant>.api.workflowmanagement.cfapps.<region>.hana.ondemand.com, TokenServiceURL=https://<tenant>.authentication.<region>.hana.ondemand.com/oauth/token
A FAIRE — SuccessFactors (optionnel) : destination 'successfactors', Auth=OAuth2SAMLBearerAssertion, URL=https://api<DC>.successfactors.com

responseHeaders.name: Content-Security-Policy
responseHeaders.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: https:; connect-src 'self' https://*.hana.ondemand.com https://*.cfapps.eu10.hana.ondemand.com https://*.cfapps.eu20.hana.ondemand.com; frame-ancestors 'self' https://*.hana.ondemand.com https://*.cfapps.eu10.hana.ondemand.com
